code:
type Light =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next(_ l: Light) -> Light
  match l
  when Red
    Light.Green
  when Green
    Light.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Light.Red
  end
end

fn name(_ l: Light) -> String
  match l
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

mut state = Light.Red
print(name(state))
state = next(state)
print(name(state))
state = next(state)
print(name(state))
state = next(state)
print(name(state))
